knowledge_changes: Product Control Room spec now names Cytoscape.js as the first graph visualization engine and preserves local-first/no-CDN constraints.
System Control Room UI spec now requires local serving of the Cytoscape.js asset from the installed package and a clear renderer-unavailable fallback.
roadmap_changes: TASK-063 tracks implementation of the Cytoscape.js graph renderer prototype.
assumptions: Cytoscape.js built-in layouts are enough for the initial Graph view prototype; specialized directed layout can be added later if needed.
